positions.title: Co-Director
description: Handling operations and B2B partnerships for geospatial agritech startup focused on precision agriculture.

positions.title: Chief Remote Sensing Scientist
description: Led the technical team in building geospatial solutions for crop monitoring using satellite and drone-based remote sensing technologies.

positions.title: Senior Research Fellow
description: Advanced research in geospatial analysis and remote sensing applications for agricultural monitoring and phenological studies.

positions.title: Junior Research Fellow (JRF)
description: Conducted research on phenocam-based plant phenology monitoring and satellite-based crop assessment using machine learning techniques.

positions.title: Civil Site Engineer
description: Supervised construction activities, executed quality control and designs with on-site teams in power plant projects.

positions.title: Architectural Design Intern
description: Assisted in architectural design and documentation for residential and commercial projects, gaining hands-on experience in CAD and site management.
